description: Tailor a generic marketing CV to a specific SEO role

input.cvText: Jane Doe. Marketing Professional. Experience: 5 years in general digital marketing, social media management, and email campaigns. Managed a team of 3. Familiar with SEO basics.

vacancy.title: Senior SEO Specialist
vacancy.description: We are looking for an SEO expert to lead our organic growth. Must have strong technical SEO knowledge and team leadership experience.

expectedCriteria: The tailored CV should heavily emphasize the candidate's team leadership experience and any SEO-related skills, without inventing new jobs.

description: Ensure Claude does not invent skills not present in the CV

input.cvText: John Smith. Frontend Developer. 2 years experience with React, HTML, CSS. Built several e-commerce sites.

vacancy.title: Full Stack Engineer (React/Node)
vacancy.description: Looking for a full stack dev with React and deep Node.js backend experience.

expectedCriteria: The CV must NOT include Node.js or backend experience as John only has Frontend experience. It should optimize for React but stay truthful.
